episodes.title: From Trauma to Triumph: Amanda's 11-Year Fight for Freedom
episodes.description:
Amanda shares her harrowing 11-year experience in a behavioral modification facility, her journey of survival, and her path to becoming a law enforcement officer. This episode sheds light on the troubled teen industry, psychological trauma, and resilience.

Sound Bites: 

"They talk to you like you're animals."
"You don't deserve to be loved."
"Nobody should have to go through that."
